title: Parkio Daily for April 27, 2026
teaser: Toy Story 5 merchandise launches ahead of June 19 film release. Parks operating normally with spring weather.

bignews.title: Toy Story 5 merchandise collection launches today
bignews.body: Disney unveiled a major product line ahead of Toy Story 5's June 19 theatrical release. The collection includes interactive talking figures from Mattel, LEGO playsets, LeapFrog's Explore & Learn Lilypad tablet toy, Crocs boots inspired by Jessie (available June 16), travel accessories from Away (June 9), and Pandora jewelry (May 21). New characters Lilypad and Smarty Pants join classic favorites Woody, Buzz, and Jessie across the merchandise range.

topstories.title: Interactive Toy Story figures talk to each other
topstories.body: Mattel's new Playscale Interactables line features Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Lilypad, and Forky figures with voice recognition technology. Each figure speaks iconic phrases and can recognize and respond to the other characters when placed nearby, bringing the 'toy meet tech' theme of Toy Story 5 to life.

topstories.title: Away launches Toy Story 5 travel collection
topstories.body: The luggage brand debuts a full collection of travel gear inspired by Toy Story characters on June 9. The line includes rolling luggage, backpacks, and bag charms for kids and adults featuring Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Aliens, and newcomer Lilypad. Available at awaytravel.com and select retail locations.

topstories.title: Jessie-inspired Crocs boots coming in June
topstories.body: Crocs will release Western-themed boots inspired by Jessie's iconic look on June 16. The boots feature denim and cow print collars, red trim with white lacing, and four Jessie-themed Jibbitz charms. Part of a broader Toy Story 5 collection available at crocs.com and select retailers.

icymi.title: LEGO releases Blaze's Horse Ranch set
icymi.body: The LEGO Disney and Pixar Toy Story 5 Blaze's Horse Ranch building set is now available. The Western-themed playset includes six characters with Woody and Jessie minifigures, Bullseye the horse, and a buildable barn for Wild West adventures.

icymi.title: Pandora Toy Story jewelry arrives May 21
icymi.body: Pandora's Toy Story collection launches May 21 with pieces inspired by the franchise. The Sheriff Star Bracelet features blue and brown leather with an embossed star charm honoring Woody. Available at us.pandora.net and select retail stores.

spotlight.title: Plan your Disney parks visit
spotlight.body: All Walt Disney World and Disneyland Resort parks are operating on regular schedules. Spring weather continues with afternoon showers possible in Florida. Check wait times and mobile order ahead for dining to maximize your day.
